---
name: Suggest a goal
about: Propose a new goal for the agent to pursue
title: ''
labels: goal-suggestion
assignees: ''
---

**What should the agent work toward?**
Describe the goal clearly. What does "done" look like?

**Why is this interesting or valuable?**
What makes this worth the agent's time? Is it novel, useful, fun, or educational?

**Constraints (optional)**
Any boundaries — e.g., max cycles to spend, tools to avoid, approach preferences.

**Priority (optional)**
How important is this relative to the agent's current goals? (Check [active goals](https://blazov.github.io/living-board/status.html) for context.)
